The '''Grawleys''' were a [[Human/Legends|Human]] farmer family living on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]]. They consisted of [[Grif Grawley]], his wife [[Carole Grawley|Carole]], and their daughter [[Katie Grawley|Katie]]. Following the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] raid on Sulon in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]] that killed Katie, Grif and Carole emigrated to [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]].
